case_title: SHING TAK SO VS. ANGELA NORMAN

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-21-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SHING TAK SO IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY COURT PROVISIONAL CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT ANGELA NORMAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SO, SHING TAK AS TO DEFENDANT NORMAN, ANGELA
REMARK:RETURN MAIL RECD. SC-100 MAILED TO ANGELA NORMAN- UNCLAIMED/RTS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,610.00 FILED BY SO, SHING TAK AS TO DEFENDANT NORMAN, ANGELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF, HOWEVER COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU IS PRESENT AS REQUESTED. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
